title: Marketplace Manager - Urban Ladder - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Urban Ladder - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!
